nasb.text: He divided the 300 men into three companies, and he put trumpets and empty pitchers into the hands of all of them, with torches inside the pitchers.

esv.text: And he divided the 300 men into three companies and put trumpets into the hands of all of them and empty jars, with torches inside the jars.

cnv.text: 於是他把三百人分作三隊，把角和空瓶交在各人手裡，又把火把放在瓶裡。

ccb.text: 基甸把三百人分成三队，分给他们号角和藏有火把的瓦瓶，
